title: PCMC Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 81 Medical Officer, Staff Nurse and Other Posts
description: The Pimpri Chinchwad Municipal Corporation (PCMC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 81 Medical Officer, Staff Nurse, and Multi Purpose Worker Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 12th, GNM, BAMS, MBBS, and B.Sc Nursing can apply for the PCMC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned...
